title: Tiered Ominous Bottles
description: Adds a texture for each tier of Ominous Bottle!
body:
Adds a texture for each tier of Ominous Bottle. This lets you easily distinguish between without having to check the tooltip!

**Each tier progressively makes the bottle more angry and sinister in your inventory:**

- Bad Omen 1 - The bottle is sleeping with little particles

- Bad Omen 2 - The bottle is similar to its vanilla texture with added flair

- Bad Omen 3 - The bottle gets angry and the particles thicken

- Bad Omen 4 - The bottle is deviously angry with the fancy particles fully formed

- Bad Omen 5 - The bottle is fuming mad, crying anger with even more particles

No other texture changes—just 5 texture tweaks!

![A gif of the 5 tiers of the Ominous Bottles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71c85659ade0699736bfac1eec4e43092581eb52.gif)

**As of Minecraft 1.21.4, this pack is availbale for vanilla! Versions before this require [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or OptiFine**
